calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-11-2023 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter is on calendar this day sent forthwith from Department 206 for Short Cause Trial Prove up Hearing as to Defendant Linda A. Kral.

Dept. 505; Judge: Sylvia L. Husing; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:53 a.m., and concluded at 11:15 a.m. (D505)

Robert Kennard, Esq. appearing for and on behalf of Plaintiff Bank of America, N.A.
Defendant Linda A. Kral not appearing.
Employee and Authorized representative for Plaintiff, George Garcia, was placed under oath and testified.

Plaintiff Complaint for Common Counts filed October 7, 2022.
Defendant's answer filed January 31, 2023.
Notice of time and place of trial filed April 24, 2023.

The Plaintiff submit/s the following exhibit/s for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Statements Of Account
Exhibit 2: Credit Card Agreement

Employee and Authorized representative for Plaintiff, George Garcia was examined by the Court.

The matter is submitted.

The Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff Bank of America, N.A. and against Defendant Linda A. Kral are as follows:

Damages $8,211.04
Costs $315.05

Proposed judgment signed and filed this day.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-11-2023 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-24-2023 Set For Trial On Sep-11-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
